productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed White Top
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The graphic print of the Manga inspired female character gives a fun vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans, carpis or shorts.
